summary: Secretary's isTerminal() only recognizes 'failed' and 'blocked' — 'returned' and 'checkpointed' are not terminal, creating inconsistency with state machine sink states
reduceCampaignState evaluates predicates on original previous state, not progressively updated state — retryBudgets never mutated, entryActions never executed
Four different Binder interfaces exist (binder.ts, types.ts, secretary.ts, integrator.ts) — the canonical rich evidence envelope is never wired into the secretary's terminal path
repairing → scoping transition has no-op entryActions — decrement_repair_budget never executed inside reducer, risking infinite repair loop
